title: Caturus tortuosa
taxonomy: Caturus tortuosa is actually a fossil species of a type of sea snail, belonging to the family Turritellidae. The classification of Caturus tortuosa places it within the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Trochida. These classifications group Caturus tortuosa among other related marine gastropods. The family Turritellidae, to which Caturus tortuosa belongs, is known for its spiral shells. Further classification may include the genus Caturus, which is a distinct grouping within the larger family.
